ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
BSSUnfold is a Python package for neutron spectrum unfolding from measurements obtained with Bonner
Sphere Spectrometers (BSS). The package implements several mathematical algorithms for solving the inverse problem
of unfolding neutron energy spectra from detector readings, with applications in radiation protection,
nuclear physics research, and accelerator facilities.
about.summary: Python package for neutron spectrum unfolding from measurements obtained with Bonner Sphere Spectrometer (BSS)

about.description:
BSSUnfold is a Python package for neutron spectrum unfolding from measurements obtained with Bonner
Sphere Spectrometers (BSS). The package implements several mathematical algorithms for solving the inverse problem
of unfolding neutron energy spectra from detector readings, with applications in radiation protection,
nuclear physics research, and accelerator facilities.
about.summary: Python package for neutron spectrum unfolding from measurements obtained with Bonner Sphere Spectrometer (BSS)

name: bssunfold
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "bssunfold" %}
{% set version = "0.1.1" %}
{% set python_min = "3.11" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/bssunfold-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 4d2332e41e3d56a03653687575e1c477a4e0e441125f245f50127c864ff82f1c

build:
  entry_points:
    - bssunfold = bssunfold:main
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  number: 0


requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - hatchling >=1.26
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - numpy >=2.0
    - scipy >=1.16.3
    - cvxpy >=1.1
    - pandas >=2.3.3
    - matplotlib-base >=3.10.8
    - pyzmq >=27.1.0

test:
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}
  imports:
    - bssunfold
  commands:
    - pip check

about:
  home: https://github.com/Radiationsafety/bssunfold
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Python package for neutron spectrum unfolding from measurements obtained with Bonner Sphere Spectrometer (BSS)
  description: |
    BSSUnfold is a Python package for neutron spectrum unfolding from measurements obtained with Bonner 
    Sphere Spectrometers (BSS). The package implements several mathematical algorithms for solving the inverse problem 
    of unfolding neutron energy spectra from detector readings, with applications in radiation protection, 
    nuclear physics research, and accelerator facilities.
  dev_url: https://github.com/Radiationsafety/bssunfold
  doc_url: https://bssunfold.readthedocs.io/en/latest/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - Radiationsafety
